targets.boundary: Company-wide, entire value chain (operations, supply chain, product lifecycle)
targets.notes: Company plans to cut total footprint by 75% from 2015 and neutralize the remainder to achieve 2030 carbon neutrality.
targets.title: Reduce total GHG emissions 75% by 2030 vs 2015 baseline
